title: Step-By-Step Guide To Creating 3DGS Animations Online
text:
Amber Rutherford
Senior Editor
10 November 2025
How To Create Simple Animations Using 3D Gaussian Splats
#
News
#
Photogrammetry
Gabriele Romagnoli shared a workflow accessible for free through GVRM.
To capture himself in 3DGS, Gabriele Romagnoli used XGRIDS PortalCam, though any tool can work, as he shared. Next, he ensured the splat's orientation was correct using Supersplat, and then imported the file into
GVRM
by Naruya Kondo, a web-based 3D avatar system.
GVRM is a three.js implementation of the Instant Skinned Gaussian Avatars paper. More details are available
here
. "Done! You can set various animations, switch to different views, and even have multiple avatars walking around you", commented Gabriele.
Gabriele Romagnoli previously shared a clip featuring so-called "synthetic" Gaussian Splats with
Apple Vision Pro, which you can learn more about by
clicking this link
.
Here, he colored 3D Gaussian Splats using Vision Pro with Coloring Book Colour by Adam Roszyk:
